gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health metrics and stats for all the amazing apps in our community greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest usage and health data.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about automated daily checks on the 'greenhouse' (community apps). The Monitor Robot acting as an automated gardener checking on plants, with Polly the bee assisting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny gardener's hat. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky retro sprites.
